title: Easy Peasy Gunpowder
description: This mod adds two easy and balanced gunpowder recipes.
body: Adds two simple, vanilla-friendly crafting recipes for gunpowder using existing materials. One recipe uses flint and charcoal, while the other uses blaze powder, glowstone dust, and charcoal for a higher yield. Works between Fabric 1.21 to 1.21.11. the first recipe, which uses 2 charcoal and 2 flint. the second recipe, that uses a blaze powder, two glowstone dust and one charcoal.
